# agentation-wc

Web Component wrapper for [Agentation](https://github.com/benjitaylor/agentation). Drop a script tag, get the visual feedback tool. No React setup needed.

## Usage

```html
<script src="https://unpkg.com/agentation-wc"></script>
<agentation-tool></agentation-tool>
```

Or in a Kirby template (dev only):

```php
<?php if ($kirby->option('debug')): ?>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/agentation-wc"></script>
<agentation-tool></agentation-tool>
<?php endif ?>
```
